description: Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning — residential + light commercial. AC repair, heating/furnace, install, maintenance plans, indoor air quality, emergency service.

bullets: Hook: Pain-led — "AC blowing warm air? We can be there today." Match the weather forecast in copy
Format: Short vertical video of a tech diagnosing in 60 seconds — beats static for cost-per-lead
CTA: "Book Same-Day Service" — same-day availability is the #1 conversion lever
Offer: $89 diagnostic fee waived with repair; free second opinion on quotes over $500
Angle: Geo-targeted by ZIP + heat-index trigger — spend heaviest on 90°F+ days
Hook: "Furnace not turning on? Don't sleep cold." Lead with the worst-case emotional outcome
Format: Carousel — diagnostic checklist (5 things to check before you call us) earns trust
CTA: "Book a Tune-Up" pre-season (Sept–Oct); "Emergency Service" Nov–Feb
Offer: $49 pre-season furnace tune-up — loss-leader to capture maintenance plan signups
Angle: Safety angle (CO detection, old furnace) converts older homeowners better than price
Hook: "Energy bill spiked? Your system may be on its last summer." Educate, then offer estimate
Format: Lead-gen form ads with calculator-style headline ("See your replacement cost in 60 sec")
CTA: "Get a Free In-Home Estimate" — high-ticket, never use "Book Now" here
Offer: 0% financing for 12 months + utility rebate handling — financing beats discount on $8K+ tickets
Angle: Target homeowners 35–65, home value $300K+, with home-improvement intent layered in
Hook: "Skip the emergency call. Two visits a year, priority service, no surprises."
Format: Static comparison image — Without Plan vs With Plan side-by-side savings
CTA: "Join the Comfort Club" or "Enroll Today" — branded plan name lifts perceived value
Offer: First-year discount or free filter for life — recurring revenue is the prize, not the first sale
Angle: Retarget anyone who got a repair in last 90 days — highest-converting segment by far
Hook: "Allergies worse indoors than outside?" — health angle outperforms duct-cleanliness angle
Format: Before/after dust-in-duct photo carousel — visceral, drives saves and shares
CTA: "Schedule a Free Air Quality Test" — low-commitment entry to whole-home filtration upsell
Offer: Free duct inspection with any HVAC service — bundle play, not standalone
Angle: Target parents of young kids + allergy/asthma interest stack — converts 2× the broad audience
Hook: "Restaurant comfort issues killing your reviews?" Lead with business pain, not equipment
Format: Long-form lead form ad — commercial buyers want detail, single-image works fine
CTA: "Request a Site Visit" — never a phone CTA for commercial, decision-makers prefer email
Offer: Free preventive maintenance audit — opens the door to a service contract
Angle: Job-title targeting (facility manager, GM, owner) + B2B interest stack; LinkedIn-style copy
Hook: "No AC? No heat? We answer 24/7 — local, licensed, here in under 2 hours."
Format: Single-image with phone number burned into the creative — call-driving, not click-driving
CTA: "Call Now" with Click-to-Call ad — every minute matters when their HVAC is dead
Offer: No after-hours upcharge — emotional differentiator against incumbents
Angle: Always-on geo-targeted campaign — bid up during nights/weekends/holidays
